title: koniga maritima
intro: Koniga maritima, also known as sea lavender or sea rosemary, is a perennial plant that grows in coastal areas, characterized by its small, blue-purple flowers and needle-like leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Koniga maritima include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Koniga maritima can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
